docket_entries.description: REMARK: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO BRADLEY BUSSOLINI ON 08/23/16 RETURNED BY U.S. POSTAL SERVICE LABELED "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BUSSOLINI, BRADLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC. $5,449.50 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,584.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,740.50 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 03/16/2017. AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $60.00 - SERVED JUN-30-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF BRADLEY BUSSOLINI & DEFENDANT FREDERICK HEIDLER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSSOLINI, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSSOLINI, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,449.50 FILED BY BUSSOLINI, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BUSSOLINI, BRADLEY AS TO DEFENDANT HEIDLER, FREDERICK DBA  OPENROAD LLC.
